message:
fix(freeze): restore unrolled loop optimization and fix remaining opcodes

Restore the 4-accumulator unrolled loop optimization for JSArray sum patterns
that was accidentally removed. This breaks the data dependency chain and enables
instruction-level parallelism.

Also fix remaining opcode implementations:
- to_propkey/to_propkey2: proper property key conversion
- check_ctor: validate constructor context via this_val check
- check_ctor_return: validate return with proper CV wrapping
- set_name: set function name using atom operand
- close_loc: free local variable being closed over
- define_method: use atom_u8 operand for method name
- delete: proper reference handling after deletion

Performance results:
- loop: EdgeBox 47ms vs Bun 66ms (1.4x faster)
- fib(45): EdgeBox 3288ms vs Bun 5140ms (1.56x faster)
